For Indian Diaspora Professionals

Structured fractional work. Fair compensation. Real impact.

You've built pipelines, entered markets, and closed enterprise deals across international markets. BridgeScale gives you a structured way to deploy that expertise fractionally — compensated, scoped, and platform-managed.

Join as fractional talent →See the vetting process
Why BridgeScale

Not unpaid mentoring. Not angel investing. Structured commercial work.

Compensated, not voluntary
Every engagement is scoped, documented, and paid. No more informal advisory calls where your expertise generates value you never see.
Fits your schedule
Designed to work alongside your existing full-time role. Most engagements need 15–20 hours/week. You set your availability.
Platform handles the admin
Contracting, cross-border payments, compliance, EOR support, milestone tracking — we handle the mechanics so you focus on delivery.
Build a fractional portfolio
Work with multiple companies. Build a track record on the platform. Your reputation and engagement history compound over time.
Indian startups that need you
The demand side is specifically Indian startups and MSMEs going international — companies that need your market fluency and networks.
Path to more
Start fractional. If a company and you both want full-time, the platform supports that transition. 80% of our leadership engagements convert.
The vetting process

Three stages. Only the qualified make it through.

We receive hundreds of applications. Our multi-stage process ensures every professional on BridgeScale has proven their ability to deliver.

01
Verified references
Provide 5 references from past employers and clients — including the CEO or founder, other executives, and at least 2 direct reports. All references are contacted and verified by our team.
We verify every reference personally. No automated checks.
02
Expert interview
A live video interview with a subject matter expert on our team. We assess your communication skills, depth of commercial experience, domain expertise, and professionalism. For leadership candidates: you must clearly demonstrate a turnaround — your role, metrics, and how you worked cross-functionally.
We screen for experience AND fit, not just credentials.
03
Domain-specific pitch
For sales execution roles: review a proprietary case study and submit a 60–90 second pitch video. Every pitch is reviewed by peers in the network — not by an algorithm. For leadership roles: present a structured turnaround narrative with cross-functional metrics and stakeholder navigation.
Peer review ensures quality — our network holds itself accountable.
How engagement works

From acceptance to active delivery.

01
Get accepted into the network
Pass all three vetting stages. Your profile goes live and is visible to the matching engine.
One-time
02
Get matched to relevant companies
AI matches you based on your expertise, market knowledge, ACV range, and engagement preferences. No cold outreach needed — companies come to you.
AI-powered
03
Engage on your terms
Choose your structure: consultation, sprint, retainer, success-fee, or hybrid. Set your availability and pricing. All documented in a Scope of Work.
You choose
04
Deliver with platform support
Milestone-tracked engagements. Platform handles invoicing, payments, compliance. You focus on delivering commercial results.
Managed
Compensation structures

Multiple ways to get paid. All documented. All platform-managed.

Monthly retainer
$5,000–$10,000/mo
Ongoing fractional engagement with a fixed monthly fee. Regular cadence, sustained delivery. Ideal for 15–20 hours/week.
Sprint fee
From $2,500
Fixed fee for a time-boxed project. Deliver a defined outcome in a defined window. Clear scope, clear compensation.
Success fee
Outcome-based
Compensation tied to commercial results — deals closed, partnerships activated, revenue generated. Aligned incentives.
Hybrid cash + equity
Negotiated
Lower cash retainer combined with meaningful equity. For talent willing to share risk for higher upside. Documented via FAST templates.
Platform takes a 10% fee on cash engagements to cover vetting, onboarding, contracting, payments, and compliance. You see transparent pricing for every engagement.
Fractional roles available

Deploy your expertise where it matters most.

Fractional VP Sales / CRO
Sales execution (SDR, BDR, AE)
Channel & reseller development
Alliance & partnership ops
International market entry
GTM strategy & refinement
Outbound pipeline generation
Revenue operations & cadence
Founder-led sales transition
Customer success & retention

Join BridgeScale — $50 one-time application fee covers your vetting and onboarding into the network.
